svg.text: Sushrut Pakhale
+44-7454710127 | spakhale.sp@gmail.com | www.linkedin.com/in/sushrut-pakhale
Personal Statement

foreignObject.div: Leadminded Software Engineer who builds reliable, scalable systems across Azure and containerised environments. I guide teams on architecture, standards, and automation, and I turn platform investments into measurable delivery and reliability gains (e.g., 35% faster deployments, proactive alerting, near zerotouch releases). I’m handson with CI/CD, IaC, observability, and secure-by-default practices, and I mentor engineers while coordinating crossfunctional delivery with QA, Ops, and Product.

svg.text: Skills
• Cloud & Data Platforms: Azure (Functions, AKS), AWS, Databricks
• Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, Java, JavaScript, Linux, C#
• Data Warehousing & Visualisation: PostgreSQL, Power BI, Snowflake
• DevOps & Automation: Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, GitOps, Terraforms, POSTMAN, Jfrog
• Software Engineering Expertise: System Design, Containerization, RESTApi, DSA, Design Pattern
Work Experience
National Grid, Warwick, UK
Senior Associate Analyst, Mar 2024 – Present
• Authored and maintained reusable CI/CD workflows for DataOps, AKS deployments, and cluster management
• reducing deployment cycle times by 35%.

• Managed AKS clusters with namespace and secret configurations and integrated monitoring stack using Grafana, Prometheus, and Azure Monitor, delivering 3 real-time dashboards and 10 proactive alerts.
• Embedded security scanning (Checkmarx One and Sonarqube), detecting vulnerabilities earlier and reducing production risks.
• Automated Power BI deployment pipeline using GitHub Actions, reducing manual effort by 100%.
• Streamlined Power BI deployment with GitHub metrics reporting for improved operational visibility for 6 months of data.
Data Engineer, Sep 2022 – Mar 2024
• Developed data ingestion pipelines using Azure Functions and Terraform to enable scalable ML training datasets.
• Designed a scalable ETL pipeline using Azure Function Apps, Databricks (PySpark), and PostgreSQL for real time vessel data ingestion.
• Built an automated anomaly detection system from Snowflake outputs, improving system uptime by 15%.
• Created Power BI dashboards to visualise ML model performance and real-time data flows, enhancing insights for data science teams.
• Automated 91% of test suites for data products and integrated validation scripts into Jenkins pipelines, improving operational reliability.
• Implemented error monitoring system with Azure Functions to enhance Snowflake reliability and reduce downtime.
